# Kateřina Axmannová – koučka a mentorka

Professional coaching and mentoring services by Kateřina Axmannová. Focusing on conscious decision making, personal growth, and corporate well-being.

## Core Services
- Individual Coaching
- Mentoring
- Corporate Well-being Programs

## Philosophy
"I guide people in situations where they need to orient themselves and make decisions in harmony with themselves."

## Contact
- Tel: +420 777 339 611
- Email: katerina@axmannova.cz
- Address: Na Výsluní 1727, Frýdlant nad Ostravicí
